title: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
short_info: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with First Class or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: ME/M.Tech in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with First Class or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.details: ₹ 37,000 per month for the first two years and ₹40,000 or 42,000 after completion of 2 years.

selection_process: Preliminary shortlisting based on resume Online Interview through Google Meet
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
